headline: Everspin Technologies Expands On-Shore MRAM Manufacturing Capacity
summary: CHANDLER, Ariz., April 08, 2026--Everspin Technologies Inc., (NASDAQ: MRAM), the world’s leading developer and manufacturer of persistent Magnetoresistive Random Access Memory (MRAM) solutions, today announced its strategic manufacturing agreement with Microchip Technology to expand production capacity and strengthen long-term supply.

headline: Everspin Technologies Enters Ten-Year Agreement Plus 2-Year Increment Extension Options With Microchip Technology  To Expand Production Capacity And Strengthen Long-Term Supply

headline: Shares of semiconductors companies are trading higher amid overall market gain as supply chain concerns eased after the U.S. and Iran reached a ceasefire deal. Also, President Trump's social media post over the proposed 15-point agenda further lifted sentiments
